meaning: v.重建,改造,复原,重新组建
examples: When she lost her job, she had to rebuild her life completely.
America and her partners are helping to rebuild roads and bridges and buildings.
They say they will stay to rebuild their homes rather than retreat to refugee camps.
They are the ones the country needs to keep to rebuild it in years to come.
But legislators had anticipated using that money to rebuild state projects after years of budget cuts.
